login.accessCodeAttempts: Los intentos se cuentan por dispositivo. Tras 2 errores, bloqueo de 5 minutos.

forgotPassword.title: Olvidé mi contraseña
forgotPassword.subtitle: Introduce el email de tu cuenta de entrenador. Te enviaremos un enlace para restablecer la contraseña.
forgotPassword.successDefault: Si el email está registrado, recibirás un enlace para restablecer la contraseña en unos minutos.
forgotPassword.errorDefault: Error al enviar la solicitud. Inténtalo de nuevo.

resetPassword.title: Restablecer contraseña
resetPassword.subtitle: Introduce tu nueva contraseña abajo.
resetPassword.success: ¡Contraseña restablecida! Inicia sesión con tu nueva contraseña.
resetPassword.errorDefault: Error al restablecer la contraseña. Inténtalo de nuevo.
resetPassword.invalidLink: Enlace inválido. Solicita un nuevo email en Olvidé mi contraseña.
resetPassword.passwordMinLength: La contraseña debe tener al menos 6 caracteres.

deleteStudent.warning: This cannot be undone. All workouts and progress for this student will be lost.

workouts.librarySelectHint: Select an existing workout to reuse exercises and save time.

brand.title: App colors (student view)
brand.subtitle: Customize buttons and highlights your students see — does not change your trainer panel.

logo.title: Trainer logo
logo.subtitle: Your brand appears in the student view. Choose a photo from the gallery — square PNG or JPG recommended.
logo.iosHint: On iPhone/iPad you can also choose "Take Photo" in the system picker.
logo.invalidType: Select an image (JPEG, PNG or WebP).

student.openOnYoutube: ¿No puedes ver aquí? Abrir en YouTube
student.noWorkoutTodayDesc: ¡Disfruta tu día de descanso o mira tus otros entrenamientos!
student.noWorkoutForDayDesc: Tu entrenador aún no definió entrenamiento para este día

blocked.title: Pago pendiente
blocked.message1: Identificamos un pago mensual pendiente. Por eso, el acceso a los entrenamientos fue bloqueado automáticamente por el sistema.
blocked.message2: Regulariza el pago para restaurar tu acceso. Una vez confirmado, los entrenamientos se desbloquearán.
blocked.whatsappMessage: ¡Hola! Me gustaría regularizar mi pago para desbloquear el acceso a los entrenamientos.

errors.tooManyAttempts: Demasiados intentos de login. Espera 5 minutos para intentar de nuevo.
errors.deleteStudent: Error al eliminar alumno. Inténtalo de nuevo.
errors.updateBlock: Error al actualizar bloqueo. Inténtalo de nuevo.
errors.subscriptionLimit: Límite de alumnos del plan gratuito alcanzado. Suscríbete para añadir más.
errors.deleteWorkout: Error al eliminar entreno. Inténtalo de nuevo.
errors.youtubeLoad: No se pudieron cargar sugerencias de YouTube.
errors.imagesLoad: No se pudieron cargar sugerencias de imágenes.
errors.studentLimitTooltip: Límite de alumnos alcanzado en el plan gratuito.
errors.selectDayRequired: Select a day of the week
errors.selectOneDayRequired: Select at least one day of the week

subscription.openDeviceSettings: Abre la configuración de suscripción de tu dispositivo.
subscription.storeMessage: Abre la app Gym Code en la tienda y suscríbete al plan Pro. Tu cuenta se actualizará automáticamente.
subscription.downloadAppMessage: Descarga Gym Code en App Store o Google Play para suscribirte al plan Pro con pago seguro.

subscription.linkedToStore: Subscription linked to your store account.
subscription.cancelNote: Cancel in App Store or Google Play settings. You keep Pro until the paid period ends.

subscription.benefitSecurePay: Secure payment via Apple or Google
subscription.subscribeViaStore: Subscribe via App Store / Google Play
subscription.browserNote: In the browser, you will be redirected to your phone store. Subscription only works in the Gym Code mobile app.

register.welcomeTitle: Let's set up your professional space
register.welcomeSubtitle: In a few steps you'll be ready to train clients with organization.
register.identitySubtitle: Your name will appear to students in the app.
register.accessSubtitle: Phone and CREF are optional but help with credibility.
register.addressSubtitle: Address for future billing — you can skip if you prefer.
register.celebrationSubtitle: Workouts, clients and training — all in one place.
register.journeyStarts: {{name}}, your journey as a trainer starts now.
register.errorDefault: Error signing up. Please try again.

validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters.

account.deletePersonalDesc: Permanently removes your trainer account, all students, workouts and associated data. This cannot be undone.
account.deleteStudentDesc: Permanently removes your student profile, workout history and progress. This cannot be undone.
account.personalBullet1: Your trainer account will be removed
account.personalBullet2: All your students will be deleted
account.personalBullet3: Workouts, messages and history will be erased
account.studentBullet1: Your student profile will be removed
account.studentBullet2: Your workout history and progress will be erased
account.studentBullet3: You will need a new registration to use the app again
account.confirmPasswordIntro: Enter your password to confirm your identity:
account.acknowledge: I understand all my data will be permanently deleted and I cannot recover this account.
account.deleteError: Could not delete account. Please try again.

legal.disclosure: Gym Code Pro Monthly — auto-renewing subscription every 1 month. Price shown on App Store/Google Play at purchase will be charged and renewed unless cancelled at least 24 hours before the current period ends.
legal.cancelHow: Cancel in Settings → Apple ID → Subscriptions (iOS) or play.google.com → Subscriptions (Android).

preview.title: Vista previa — vista del alumno
preview.simulationHint: Simulación de cómo verá el alumno la app en el móvil
